channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Blue Angels Pilot Admits Mistake in Low-Altitude Flyover Over Florida Beach Amid Political Reactions
item.description: A U.S. Navy Blue Angels pilot involved in a controversial low-altitude flyover over Pensacola, Florida, has reportedly admitted the maneuver was a mistake rather than a political statement. The incide...

item.title: Canadian FM's Strategic Visit to Pakistan Focuses on Trade and Bilateral Ties
item.description: Canadian Foreign Minister Anita Anand is set to visit Pakistan this week, marking the first such visit in 20 years. The announcement by Global Affairs Canada highlights efforts to strengthen strategic...

item.title: Canadian Tourism Shifts Amid U.S. Trade Tensions
item.description: Canadians are increasingly avoiding travel to the United States due to political tensions and trade disputes, marking a significant shift in cross-border tourism patterns. This boycott, driven by oppo...

item.title: Rare Meteorite Linked to Dinosaur Extinction Revealed by New Research
item.description: A rare type of meteorite known as a CO chondrite was likely the object that slammed into Earth 66 million years ago and triggered the extinction of about 75 percent of all species, including every non...

item.title: Federal Ministers Condemn Noreen Niazi's Remarks on Marka-e-Haq Conflict
item.description: Federal ministers in Pakistan have strongly condemned Noreen Niazi, sister of PTI founder Imran Khan, for her remarks regarding the Marka-e-Haq conflict, labeling them 'completely unacceptable' and ag...

item.title: Child Labour Surges Among Gaza Children Amid Crisis
item.description: The article details the alarming rise in child labor among children in Gaza, driven by years of conflict, economic blockades, and humanitarian crises. Children are increasingly forced into labor to su...

item.title: Kithure Kindiki Reassures Mt Kenya Of Unity Amid Political Challenges
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has assured the Mt. Kenya region of its continued unity within the Kenya Kwanza Alliance government, dismissing recent electoral losses as temporary distractions. Spea...

item.title: Legal Dispute Over Sonam Wangchuk's Hospitalization Rights Continues as Delhi HC Seeks Medical Update
item.description: The article details the legal battle between Gitanjali Angmo, wife of activist Sonam Wangchuk, and government authorities over his hospitalization. Angmo petitioned the Delhi High Court (HC) to transf...

item.title: Peter Obi Shares Reasons for Choosing Kwankwaso as Running Mate, Emphasizes Education and Economic Revival
item.description: Peter Obi, presidential candidate of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), explained his choice of Rabiu Kwankwaso as his running mate, highlighting their shared philosophy of tackling poverty throug...

item.title: Romualdez's Lawyer Says No Evidence Against Him in Flood Control Probe
item.description: Leyte Rep. Martin Romualdez's lawyer, Ade Fajardo, stated that the former Speaker is prepared to face any complaints from the Office of the Ombudsman regarding flood control anomalies. However, Fajard...

item.title: Victoria lowers lawsuit threshold for social media negligence and introduces troll disclosure powers
item.description: The Victorian government will significantly reduce the legal barriers for parents seeking compensation from social media platforms for negligence that causes psychiatric harm to their children. This l...

item.title: Alberta's Immigration Referendum and Its Impact on Temporary Residents
item.description: The article examines Alberta's upcoming referendum on immigration policies, focusing on the potential consequences for temporary residents. The referendum includes questions about restricting health a...

item.title: Tanzania-Egypt Forum Discusses Trade and Investment Growth
item.description: The article highlights key developments from July 19, 2026, focusing on international cooperation and local events. A major topic is the Tanzania-Egypt forum, which outlines strategies to boost trade ...

item.title: Turkiye's Growing Influence in Africa Through Strategic Alliances and Infrastructure Projects
item.description: The article explores how Turkey, under President Erdogan, is expanding its influence across Africa through a combination of strategic partnerships, infrastructure development, and diplomatic engagemen...

item.title: Readers share humorous anecdotes and memorable moments
item.description: The article features a collection of reader-submitted jokes and stories, highlighting lighthearted humor and nostalgic recollections. One joke involves an 'old fart' and a 'lost sock' in a bar, with p...

item.title: Moses Kuria Seeks Acceptance from Other Kenyan Communities Following Rift with Rigathi Gachagua
item.description: Former Trade Cabinet Secretary Moses Kuria has appealed to Kenyans from communities outside the Mt. Kenya region to welcome him after former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua publicly declared him an ...

item.title: Kenyan Couple Reunites After Months Apart as Husband Joins Newborn Baby's Life
item.description: A Kenyan woman shared an emotional story of her husband's journey from Dubai to Kenya to meet their newborn child, fulfilling a promise made during a difficult period. After quitting her job in Dubai ...

item.title: PNP Clarifies National Crime Trends, Emphasizes Regional Data Over Metro Manila Focus
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) emphasized that the country's overall crime situation cannot be assessed solely based on incidents in Metro Manila, despite recent high-profile crimes sparking pub...

item.title: Criticism of Progressive Conservatives Over Public Fund Mismanagement
item.description: The article compiles letters to the editor criticizing the Progressive Conservative government of Ontario for misusing public funds, lack of transparency, and political egos. One letter highlights Dou...

item.title: Atiku calls for investigation into N210bn budget duplication in 2026
item.description: Atiku Abubakar, former VP and ADC presidential candidate, has demanded a forensic investigation into Nigeria's 2026 budget after BusinessDay's report revealed N210.23bn in duplicated allocations acros...
